TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-Lyen.Ha-wi "William Harvey" 1578 a mihca 4 a bulad 1 a demiad-1657 a mihca 6 a bulad 3 a demiad" lecuh i Ing-kow ken-te-cyun-bu-ke-s-tung a niyazu'an u sakakaay a wawa ciniza, Ing-kow 17 lasubu a mihcaan u singangany tu sen-li-sye-cya atu misaydan. maazih niza ku taliyuk nu izang, patusek tu ayzaay a ziday sen-li-ke-sye nu saayaway a palahad. ci Ha-wi sa u labang nu malawamaay ci Tan-mu-s i-s, Ing-kow nu micukaymasay tu sinilaculay mabuwak patizeng tu baluhay a saykay a lice, i cen-cean mtizeng aca tapiingan nu hungti ciniza, nika i pisakaku ni Ke-lun-wi-al, malemed caay ka satebuc ku uzip. maazih tu niza ku taliyuk nu izang atu pihatebud nu balucu' paini tu ayzaay a ziday, u kawaw niza tu sawantaneann a baluhay nu uzip ke-sye a malingatu, tungusay malingatu i16 se-ci ke-sye misabaluhayay tu cacay zumaay kahenulan a sakakapt. katayzaan niza Wi-Lyen.Ha-wi "William Harvey" i 1578 a mihca 4 a bulad 1 a demiad lecuhan i Ing-kow-Ken-te-cyun-bu-ke-s-tung a niyazu', wama niza ci Tow-ma-s.Ha-wi u kakitaan nu itiza, namala cin-cang nu Bu-ke-s-tung. wina ci Cyung-ni u ni Ken-te-cyu-ha-s-tin-lay a wawa tu tatgaynaan ni tow-ma-s.Ha-ke, ci Ha-wi sa u sakakaay a wawa nuynian a luma', zuma iza ku cacay kakana atu lalima ku sabama. Ha-wi i Kan-te-pow-ley nu singanganay tekeday a cacudadan kibisien ku ni pasubana' saayaway, tebanay a nipasubana' 15 ku mihcaan micumud tu cyen-cyaw talakaway a cacudadan minanam tu tusa a mihcaan tu mingikiway tu ising zumaay sakay sye-keay. 1602 a mihcaan, i I-tali-Po-tow-wa nu talakaway a cacudadan aca itawya Ow-cow u singanganay nu talakaway nu ke-sye a picudadan, i singanganay u micici'ay nu sye-cya-ba u pipasubana' ni Pu-li-ke a minanam. ci Ha-wi tini pinanaman, caay ku ngelu' amigingkiw, saicelang sa mikawaw, pangangan han nu kaput tu adidi'ay mitesekay ni micici'ay, sakasa i Ba-pu-li-ke-s mikawaw micici'ay tu izang nu ulat atu "satabu tu ulat tu pigingkiwan, mala u matinengay nu edapay a saydan. uyni a zidayan minanam atu mikawaw, ci Ha-al zikuz patizeng tu husu izang miyatayat a musakamu patusek a tanektek. "u kasakamuan ci Ha-wi micudad i Pa-tu-wa talakaway a cacudadan hawsa, ci Cya-li-lye itiza mala cyaw-su", caay ka tenes, aca ciniza i Ingn-kow Cyen-cyaw talakaway a cacudadan pakala tu yi-sye pow-s-sye-wi, u mihcaan niza 24 hena. makay 1603 a mihcaan malingatu, ci Ha-wi malingatu i Lon-tun mala tacuwacuwaay minngaay tu imelangay, caay ka tenes ciniza atu ci I-li-sa-pay hungti a misaydan ci Lang-s-low.Pu-lang a tataynaan a wawa malaacawa. nayi' ku tataynaay awaw nayi' ku tatamaan a wawa ni Ha-wi. uyni a kalaacawa sakay ci Ha-wiyan a kawawan tabaki ku sipiedap. 607 a mihcaan Ha-wi mizawis tu nu hungtiay luma' nu i-sye-yen a sakaput. 609 a mihcaan, makay hungti ci Tan-mu-s i-s atu hungtiay a luma' i-sye-yen-yen-cang ci Hen-li.A-te-cin-s pow-se a nisiwkayan, ci Ha-wi pakala tu Sen-pa-tow-low-mu-i-yen nu sapicunus tu mikawaway tu misaydan, tawya a mihcaan tu lalud, padekuan a Wi-al-cin-sen pow-se mapatay, ci Ha-li mipakutuy tu niliwanan niza tu nayay a tademaw, malingatu teked tu paisingan. Ha-wi pay lipa kinacaca a demiad mueneng i paisiidaingan tepal nu takal mihahalan tu paisingay, sidait ciniza tu labades nu imelangay, ciniza ku miazih tu cayay kakapah ku cilil nu imelangay, nacaay piasip ahacica ku kalisiw, hina caay piala tu kalisiw nu paisinga nu pakuyucay u nizateng niza, misaydan "paayaw tu pakuyucay". au ciniza ku situngus , mangelu' amikawaw, dadawa mala singanganay a misaydan nu Lunt-un. namalaheci niza ku kawaw tu micici' tu cucu', masuped ku kayadah nu natinengan tu sapingaay tu nu tataynaay a pilecuh, au haca u misiket tu nu ulat husu nu izang, tu pucu', namingay nu kasiiyuan a lalekalan, namingaay tu pucu'a gang. Namahiza, ci Ha-wi caay ku matinengzay a misaydan dada', asaca u midiputa tu tademaw sinizatenganay a Ke-sye-cya. 1615 a mihcaan mala situngusay tu misakamuay ni Lu-mu-lye-en, 1615 a mihca 8 a bulad, ci Ha-wi mapili' mala nu hungtiay a luma'nu i-sye-yen Lu-mu-lye nu musakamuay a tadema. 1616 a mihca 4 a bulad, Ha-wi i pasubayuan a zazan Sen-paw-low a kiwkay capiay nu cacudadan pasumana' tu cudad, saayaway patahkal tu pakayniay culil nu izang. u sapasubana' tu cudad nu lima ku nisulit La-tin a sulit a malepun, imahini masinga tu i ta-Ing-kow a piazihan. i pisakamuan tu cudad hawsa, ci Ha-wi u palalecad ku pasubana', maawas ku picici' tu aadupan a musakamu tu micici' tu uzip nu tademaw sye. 1615ŚĻī, .
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == wi-r~…ĺj…ôn.ńßa-wi "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam ńßar*…ô" **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad-**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad" r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß i iŇč-kow k…ôn-t…ô- ¶jun-bu-k…ô-s-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ °an u sakakaaj a wawa ¶iniza, iŇč-kow ** r~…ĺasubu a mińß ¶aan u siŇčaŇčanj tu s…ôn-r~…ĺi-sj…ô- ¶ja atu misajdan. maazińß niza ku tar~…ĺijuk nu izaŇč, patus…ôk tu ajzaaj a zidaj s…ôn-r~…ĺi-k…ô-sj…ô nu saajawaj a par~…ĺańßad. ¶i ńßa-wi sa u r~…ĺabaŇč nu mar~…ĺawamaaj ¶i tan-mu-s i-s, iŇč-kow nu mi ¶ukajmasaj tu sinir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺaj mabuwak patiz…ôŇč tu bar~…ĺuńßaj a sajkaj a r~…ĺi ¶…ô, i ¶…ôn- ¶…ôan mtiz…ôŇč a ¶a tapiiŇčan nu ńßuŇčti ¶iniza, nika i pisakaku ni k…ô-r~…ĺun-wi-ar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ¶aaj ka sat…ôbu ¶ ku uzip. maazińß tu niza ku tar~…ĺijuk nu izaŇč atu pińßat…ôbud nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° paini tu ajzaaj a zidaj, u kawaw niza tu sawantan…ôann a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu uzip k…ô-sj…ô a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, tuŇčusaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu i** s…ô- ¶i k…ô-sj…ô misabar~…ĺuńßajaj tu ¶a ¶aj zumaaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sakakapt. katajzaan niza wi-r~…ĺj…ôn.ńßa-wi "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam ńßar*…ô" i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i iŇč-kow-k…ôn-t…ô- ¶jun-bu-k…ô-s-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ °, wama niza ¶i tow-ma-s.ńßa-wi u kakitaan nu itiza, namar~…ĺa ¶in- ¶aŇč nu bu-k…ô-s-tuŇč. wina ¶i ¶juŇč-ni u ni k…ôn-t…ô- ¶ju-ńßa-s-tin-r~…ĺaj a wawa tu tatgajnaan ni tow-ma-s.ńßa-k…ô, ¶i ńßa-wi sa u sakakaaj a wawa nujnian a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, zuma iza ku ¶a ¶aj kakana atu r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku sabama. ńßa-wi i kan-t…ô-pow-r~…ĺ…ô nu siŇčaŇčanaj t…ôk…ôdaj a ¶a ¶udadan kibisi…ôn ku ni pasubana Ē~ ° saajawaj, t…ôbanaj a nipasubana Ē~ ° ** ku mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud tu ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu tusa a mińß ¶aan tu miŇčikiwaj tu isiŇč zumaaj sakaj sj…ô-k…ôaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, i i-tar~…ĺi-po-tow-wa nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan a ¶a itawja ow- ¶ow u siŇčaŇčanaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj nu k…ô-sj…ô a pi ¶udadan, i siŇčaŇčanaj u mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj nu sj…ô- ¶ja-ba u pipasubana Ē~ ° ni pu-r~…ĺi-k…ô a minanam. ¶i ńßa-wi tini pinanaman, ¶aaj ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° amigiŇčkiw, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa mikawaw, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu kaput tu adidi Ē~ °aj mit…ôs…ôkaj ni mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj, sakasa i ba-pu-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s mikawaw mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj tu izaŇč nu ur~…ĺat atu "satabu tu ur~…ĺat tu pigiŇčkiwan, mar~…ĺa u matin…ôŇčaj nu …ôdapaj a sajdan. ujni a zidajan minanam atu mikawaw, ¶i ńßa-ar~…ĺ zikuz patiz…ôŇč tu ńßusu izaŇč mijatajat a musakamu patus…ôk a tan…ôkt…ôk. "u kasakamuan ¶i ńßa-wi mi ¶udad i pa-tu-wa tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ńßawsa, ¶i ¶ja-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺj…ô itiza mar~…ĺa ¶jaw-su", ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs, a ¶a ¶iniza i iŇčn-kow ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan pakar~…ĺa tu ji-sj…ô pow-s-sj…ô-wi, u mińß ¶aan niza ** ńß…ôna. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶i ńßa-wi mar~…ĺiŇčatu i r~…ĺon-tun mar~…ĺa ta ¶uwa ¶uwaaj minŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs ¶iniza atu ¶i i-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ńßuŇčti a misajdan ¶i r~…ĺaŇč-s-r~…ĺow.pu-r~…ĺaŇč a tatajnaan a wawa mar~…ĺaa ¶awa. naji Ē~ ° ku tatajnaaj awaw naji Ē~ ° ku tatamaan a wawa ni ńßa-wi. ujni a kar~…ĺaa ¶awa sakaj ¶i ńßa-wijan a kawawan tabaki ku sipi…ôdap. *** a mińß ¶aan ńßa-wi mizawis tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu i-sj…ô-j…ôn a sakaput. *** a mińß ¶aan, makaj ńßuŇčti ¶i tan-mu-s i-s atu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i-sj…ô-j…ôn-j…ôn- ¶aŇč ¶i ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi.a-t…ô- ¶in-s pow-s…ô a nisiwkajan, ¶i ńßa-wi pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôn-pa-tow-r~…ĺow-mu-i-j…ôn nu sapi ¶unus tu mikawawaj tu misajdan, tawja a mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, pad…ôkuan a wi-ar~…ĺ- ¶in-s…ôn pow-s…ô mapataj, ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi mipakutuj tu nir~…ĺiwanan niza tu najaj a tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺiŇčatu t…ôk…ôd tu paisiŇčan. ńßa-wi paj r~…ĺipa kina ¶a ¶a a d…ômiad mu…ôn…ôŇč i paisiidaiŇčan t…ôpar~…ĺ nu takar~…ĺ mińßańßar~…ĺan tu paisiŇčaj, sidait ¶iniza tu r~…ĺabad…ôs nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, ¶iniza ku miazińß tu ¶ajaj kakapańß ku ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, na ¶aaj piasip ańßa ¶i ¶a ku kar~…ĺisiw, ńßina ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺisiw nu paisiŇča nu pakuju ¶aj u nizat…ôŇč niza, misajdan "paajaw tu pakuju ¶aj". au ¶iniza ku situŇčus , maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° amikawaw, dadawa mar~…ĺa siŇčaŇčanaj a misajdan nu r~…ĺunt-un. namar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i niza ku kawaw tu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °, masup…ôd ku kajadańß nu natin…ôŇčan tu sapiŇčaaj tu nu tatajnaaj a pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß, au ńßa ¶a u misik…ôt tu nu ur~…ĺat ńßusu nu izaŇč, tu pu ¶u Ē~ °, namiŇčaj nu kasiijuan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, namiŇčaaj tu pu ¶u Ē~ °a gaŇč. namańßiza, ¶i ńßa-wi ¶aaj ku matin…ôŇčzaj a misajdan dada Ē~ °, asa ¶a u midiputa tu tad…ômaw sinizat…ôŇčanaj a k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa situŇčusaj tu misakamuaj ni r~…ĺu-mu-r~…ĺj…ô-…ôn, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ¶i ńßa-wi mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa nu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °nu i-sj…ô-j…ôn r~…ĺu-mu-r~…ĺj…ô nu musakamuaj a tad…ôma. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ńßa-wi i pasubajuan a zazan s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺow a kiwkaj ¶apiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan pasumana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad, saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu pakajniaj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč. u sapasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad nu r~…ĺima ku nisur~…ĺit r~…ĺa-tin a sur~…ĺit a mar~…ĺ…ôpun, imańßini masiŇča tu i ta-iŇč-kow a piazińßan. i pisakamuan tu ¶udad ńßawsa, ¶i ńßa-wi u par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku pasubana Ē~ °, maawas ku pi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu aadupan a musakamu tu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu uzip nu tad…ômaw sj…ô. *****, .
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Wi-Lyen.Ha-wi "William Harvey" 1578 a mihca 4 a bulad 1 a demiad-1657 a mihca 6 a bulad 3 a demiad" lecuh i Ing-kow ken-te-cyun-bu-ke-s-tung a niyazu'an u sakakaay a wawa ciniza, Ing-kow 17 lasubu a mihcaan u singangany tu sen-li-sye-cya atu misaydan. maazih niza ku taliyuk nu izang, patusek tu ayzaay a ziday sen-li-ke-sye nu saayaway a palahad. ci Ha-wi sa u labang nu malawamaay ci Tan-mu-s i-s, Ing-kow nu micukaymasay tu sinilaculay mabuwak patizeng tu baluhay a saykay a lice, i cen-cean mtizeng aca tapiingan nu hungti ciniza, nika i pisakaku ni Ke-lun-wi-al, malemed caay ka satebuc ku uzip. maazih tu niza ku taliyuk nu izang atu pihatebud nu balucu' paini tu ayzaay a ziday, u kawaw niza tu sawantaneann a baluhay nu uzip ke-sye a malingatu, tungusay malingatu i16 se-ci ke-sye misabaluhayay tu cacay zumaay kahenulan a sakakapt. katayzaan niza Wi-Lyen.Ha-wi "William Harvey" i 1578 a mihca 4 a bulad 1 a demiad lecuhan i Ing-kow-Ken-te-cyun-bu-ke-s-tung a niyazu', wama niza ci Tow-ma-s.Ha-wi u kakitaan nu itiza, namala cin-cang nu Bu-ke-s-tung. wina ci Cyung-ni u ni Ken-te-cyu-ha-s-tin-lay a wawa tu tatgaynaan ni tow-ma-s.Ha-ke, ci Ha-wi sa u sakakaay a wawa nuynian a luma', zuma iza ku cacay kakana atu lalima ku sabama. Ha-wi i Kan-te-pow-ley nu singanganay tekeday a cacudadan kibisien ku ni pasubana' saayaway, tebanay a nipasubana' 15 ku mihcaan micumud tu cyen-cyaw talakaway a cacudadan minanam tu tusa a mihcaan tu mingikiway tu ising zumaay sakay sye-keay. 1602 a mihcaan, i I-tali-Po-tow-wa nu talakaway a cacudadan aca itawya Ow-cow u singanganay nu talakaway nu ke-sye a picudadan, i singanganay u micici'ay nu sye-cya-ba u pipasubana' ni Pu-li-ke a minanam. ci Ha-wi tini pinanaman, caay ku ngelu' amigingkiw, saicelang sa mikawaw, pangangan han nu kaput tu adidi'ay mitesekay ni micici'ay, sakasa i Ba-pu-li-ke-s mikawaw micici'ay tu izang nu ulat atu "satabu tu ulat tu pigingkiwan, mala u matinengay nu edapay a saydan. uyni a zidayan minanam atu mikawaw, ci Ha-al zikuz patizeng tu husu izang miyatayat a musakamu patusek a tanektek. "u kasakamuan ci Ha-wi micudad i Pa-tu-wa talakaway a cacudadan hawsa, ci Cya-li-lye itiza mala cyaw-su", caay ka tenes, aca ciniza i Ingn-kow Cyen-cyaw talakaway a cacudadan pakala tu yi-sye pow-s-sye-wi, u mihcaan niza 24 hena. makay 1603 a mihcaan malingatu, ci Ha-wi malingatu i Lon-tun mala tacuwacuwaay minngaay tu imelangay, caay ka tenes ciniza atu ci I-li-sa-pay hungti a misaydan ci Lang-s-low.Pu-lang a tataynaan a wawa malaacawa. nayi' ku tataynaay awaw nayi' ku tatamaan a wawa ni Ha-wi. uyni a kalaacawa sakay ci Ha-wiyan a kawawan tabaki ku sipiedap. 607 a mihcaan Ha-wi mizawis tu nu hungtiay luma' nu i-sye-yen a sakaput. 609 a mihcaan, makay hungti ci Tan-mu-s i-s atu hungtiay a luma' i-sye-yen-yen-cang ci Hen-li.A-te-cin-s pow-se a nisiwkayan, ci Ha-wi pakala tu Sen-pa-tow-low-mu-i-yen nu sapicunus tu mikawaway tu misaydan, tawya a mihcaan tu lalud, padekuan a Wi-al-cin-sen pow-se mapatay, ci Ha-li mipakutuy tu niliwanan niza tu nayay a tademaw, malingatu teked tu paisingan. Ha-wi pay lipa kinacaca a demiad mueneng i paisiidaingan tepal nu takal mihahalan tu paisingay, sidait ciniza tu labades nu imelangay, ciniza ku miazih tu cayay kakapah ku cilil nu imelangay, nacaay piasip ahacica ku kalisiw, hina caay piala tu kalisiw nu paisinga nu pakuyucay u nizateng niza, misaydan "paayaw tu pakuyucay". au ciniza ku situngus , mangelu' amikawaw, dadawa mala singanganay a misaydan nu Lunt-un. namalaheci niza ku kawaw tu micici' tu cucu', masuped ku kayadah nu natinengan tu sapingaay tu nu tataynaay a pilecuh, au haca u misiket tu nu ulat husu nu izang, tu pucu', namingay nu kasiiyuan a lalekalan, namingaay tu pucu'a gang. Namahiza, ci Ha-wi caay ku matinengzay a misaydan dada', asaca u midiputa tu tademaw sinizatenganay a Ke-sye-cya. 1615 a mihcaan mala situngusay tu misakamuay ni Lu-mu-lye-en, 1615 a mihca 8 a bulad, ci Ha-wi mapili' mala nu hungtiay a luma'nu i-sye-yen Lu-mu-lye nu musakamuay a tadema. 1616 a mihca 4 a bulad, Ha-wi i pasubayuan a zazan Sen-paw-low a kiwkay capiay nu cacudadan pasumana' tu cudad, saayaway patahkal tu pakayniay culil nu izang. u sapasubana' tu cudad nu lima ku nisulit La-tin a sulit a malepun, imahini masinga tu i ta-Ing-kow a piazihan. i pisakamuan tu cudad hawsa, ci Ha-wi u palalecad ku pasubana', maawas ku picici' tu aadupan a musakamu tu micici' tu uzip nu tademaw sye. 1615ŚĻī, .

sajkaj a r~…ĺi ¶…ô, i ¶…ôn- ¶…ôan mtiz…ôŇč a ¶a tapiiŇčan nu ńßuŇčti ¶iniza, nika i pisakaku ni k…ô-r~…ĺun-wi-ar~…ĺ, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôd ¶aaj ka sat…ôbu ¶ ku uzip. maazińß tu niza ku tar~…ĺijuk nu izaŇč atu pińßat…ôbud nu bar~…ĺu ¶u Ē~ ° paini tu ajzaaj a zidaj, u kawaw niza tu sawantan…ôann a bar~…ĺuńßaj nu uzip k…ô-sj…ô a mar~…ĺiŇčatu, tuŇčusaj mar~…ĺiŇčatu i** s…ô- ¶i k…ô-sj…ô misabar~…ĺuńßajaj tu ¶a ¶aj zumaaj kańß…ônur~…ĺan a sakakapt. katajzaan niza wi-r~…ĺj…ôn.ńßa-wi "wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam ńßar*…ô" i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad r~…ĺ…ô ¶uńßan i iŇč-kow-k…ôn-t…ô- ¶jun-bu-k…ô-s-tuŇč a nijazu Ē~ °, wama niza ¶i tow-ma-s.ńßa-wi u kakitaan nu itiza, namar~…ĺa ¶in- ¶aŇč nu bu-k…ô-s-tuŇč. wina ¶i ¶juŇč-ni u ni k…ôn-t…ô- ¶ju-ńßa-s-tin-r~…ĺaj a wawa tu tatgajnaan ni tow-ma-s.ńßa-k…ô, ¶i ńßa-wi sa u sakakaaj a wawa nujnian a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °, zuma iza ku ¶a ¶aj kakana atu r~…ĺar~…ĺima ku sabama. ńßa-wi i kan-t…ô-pow-r~…ĺ…ô nu siŇčaŇčanaj t…ôk…ôdaj a ¶a ¶udadan kibisi…ôn ku ni pasubana Ē~ ° saajawaj, t…ôbanaj a nipasubana Ē~ ° ** ku mińß ¶aan mi ¶umud tu ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan minanam tu tusa a mińß ¶aan tu miŇčikiwaj tu isiŇč zumaaj sakaj sj…ô-k…ôaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, i i-tar~…ĺi-po-tow-wa nu tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan a ¶a itawja ow- ¶ow u siŇčaŇčanaj nu tar~…ĺakawaj nu k…ô-sj…ô a pi ¶udadan, i siŇčaŇčanaj u mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj nu sj…ô- ¶ja-ba u pipasubana Ē~ ° ni pu-r~…ĺi-k…ô a minanam. ¶i ńßa-wi tini pinanaman, ¶aaj ku Ňč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° amigiŇčkiw, sai ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč sa mikawaw, paŇčaŇčan ńßan nu kaput tu adidi Ē~ °aj mit…ôs…ôkaj ni mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj, sakasa i ba-pu-r~…ĺi-k…ô-s mikawaw mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ °aj tu izaŇč nu ur~…ĺat atu "satabu tu ur~…ĺat tu pigiŇčkiwan, mar~…ĺa u matin…ôŇčaj nu …ôdapaj a sajdan. ujni a zidajan minanam atu mikawaw, ¶i ńßa-ar~…ĺ zikuz patiz…ôŇč tu ńßusu izaŇč mijatajat a musakamu patus…ôk a tan…ôkt…ôk. "u kasakamuan ¶i ńßa-wi mi ¶udad i pa-tu-wa tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan ńßawsa, ¶i ¶ja-r~…ĺi-r~…ĺj…ô itiza mar~…ĺa ¶jaw-su", ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs, a ¶a ¶iniza i iŇčn-kow ¶j…ôn- ¶jaw tar~…ĺakawaj a ¶a ¶udadan pakar~…ĺa tu ji-sj…ô pow-s-sj…ô-wi, u mińß ¶aan niza ** ńß…ôna. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, ¶i ńßa-wi mar~…ĺiŇčatu i r~…ĺon-tun mar~…ĺa ta ¶uwa ¶uwaaj minŇčaaj tu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, ¶aaj ka t…ôn…ôs ¶iniza atu ¶i i-r~…ĺi-sa-paj ńßuŇčti a misajdan ¶i r~…ĺaŇč-s-r~…ĺow.pu-r~…ĺaŇč a tatajnaan a wawa mar~…ĺaa ¶awa. naji Ē~ ° ku tatajnaaj awaw naji Ē~ ° ku tatamaan a wawa ni ńßa-wi. ujni a kar~…ĺaa ¶awa sakaj ¶i ńßa-wijan a kawawan tabaki ku sipi…ôdap. *** a mińß ¶aan ńßa-wi mizawis tu nu ńßuŇčtiaj r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu i-sj…ô-j…ôn a sakaput. *** a mińß ¶aan, makaj ńßuŇčti ¶i tan-mu-s i-s atu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° i-sj…ô-j…ôn-j…ôn- ¶aŇč ¶i ńß…ôn-r~…ĺi.a-t…ô- ¶in-s pow-s…ô a nisiwkajan, ¶i ńßa-wi pakar~…ĺa tu s…ôn-pa-tow-r~…ĺow-mu-i-j…ôn nu sapi ¶unus tu mikawawaj tu misajdan, tawja a mińß ¶aan tu r~…ĺar~…ĺud, pad…ôkuan a wi-ar~…ĺ- ¶in-s…ôn pow-s…ô mapataj, ¶i ńßa-r~…ĺi mipakutuj tu nir~…ĺiwanan niza tu najaj a tad…ômaw, mar~…ĺiŇčatu t…ôk…ôd tu paisiŇčan. ńßa-wi paj r~…ĺipa kina ¶a ¶a a d…ômiad mu…ôn…ôŇč i paisiidaiŇčan t…ôpar~…ĺ nu takar~…ĺ mińßańßar~…ĺan tu paisiŇčaj, sidait ¶iniza tu r~…ĺabad…ôs nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, ¶iniza ku miazińß tu ¶ajaj kakapańß ku ¶ir~…ĺir~…ĺ nu im…ôr~…ĺaŇčaj, na ¶aaj piasip ańßa ¶i ¶a ku kar~…ĺisiw, ńßina ¶aaj piar~…ĺa tu kar~…ĺisiw nu paisiŇča nu pakuju ¶aj u nizat…ôŇč niza, misajdan "paajaw tu pakuju ¶aj". au ¶iniza ku situŇčus , maŇč…ôr~…ĺu Ē~ ° amikawaw, dadawa mar~…ĺa siŇčaŇčanaj a misajdan nu r~…ĺunt-un. namar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i niza ku kawaw tu mi ¶i ¶i Ē~ ° tu ¶u ¶u Ē~ °, masup…ôd ku kajadańß nu natin…ôŇčan tu sapiŇčaaj tu nu tatajnaaj a pir~…ĺ…ô ¶uńß, au ńßa ¶a u misik…ôt tu nu ur~…ĺat ńßusu nu izaŇč, tu pu ¶u Ē~ °, namiŇčaj nu kasiijuan a r~…ĺar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan, namiŇčaaj tu pu ¶u Ē~ °a gaŇč. namańßiza, ¶i ńßa-wi ¶aaj ku matin…ôŇčzaj a misajdan dada Ē~ °, asa ¶a u midiputa tu tad…ômaw sinizat…ôŇčanaj a k…ô-sj…ô- ¶ja. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa situŇčusaj tu misakamuaj ni r~…ĺu-mu-r~…ĺj…ô-…ôn, **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ¶i ńßa-wi mapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mar~…ĺa nu ńßuŇčtiaj a r~…ĺuma Ē~ °nu i-sj…ô-j…ôn r~…ĺu-mu-r~…ĺj…ô nu musakamuaj a tad…ôma. **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad, ńßa-wi i pasubajuan a zazan s…ôn-paw-r~…ĺow a kiwkaj ¶apiaj nu ¶a ¶udadan pasumana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad, saajawaj patańßkar~…ĺ tu pakajniaj ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ nu izaŇč. u sapasubana Ē~ ° tu ¶udad nu r~…ĺima ku nisur~…ĺit r~…ĺa-tin a sur~…ĺit a mar~…ĺ…ôpun, tad…ômaw sj…ô. *****, .
